tool_input.description: Sample a logged event to see its shape
Check TS config and package.json build setup

tool_response.stdout:
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2022",
    "module": "ES2022",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "outDir": "./dist",
    "rootDir": "./src",
    "strict": true,
    "noImplicitAny": true,
    "strictNullChecks": true,
    "noUnusedLocals": true,
    "noUnusedParameters": true,
    "noFallthroughCasesInSwitch": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "declaration": true,
    "sourceMap": true
  },
  "include": ["src/**/*"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules", "dist"]
}
---
{
  "name": "@affordance/trace",
  "version": "0.0.1",
  "description": "Every decision traced from intent to ship. A Claude Code plugin that turns your PRD into a living document.",
  "type": "module",
  "bin": {
    "trace": "./dist/cli.js"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "build": "tsc",
    "dev": "tsc --watch",
    "start": "node ./dist/cli.js",
    "test": "echo \"(tests to come)\" && exit 0"
  },
  "keywords": [
    "claude-code",
    "prd",
    "living-document",
    "hackathon",
    "opus-4.7"
  ],
  "author": "Shandar Junaid <hello@affordancedesign.in>",
  "license": "MIT",
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/node": "^20.11.0",
    "typescript": "^5.4.0"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "commander": "^14.0.3"
  }
}

lines: -  'You are a PRD updater. Given a sequence of Claude Code tool events from one session and the current TRACE.md, propose ONE short edit — a single sentence that captures what meaningfully changed or was decided during this session. Return ONLY a JSON object: {"section": "<section name>", "edit": "<one sentence>", "confidence": 0.0-1.0}. Pick the section from: Decision Log, Assumption Ledger, Open Questions, In Scope, Out of Scope. Skip proposals for trivial sessions (single file read, no state change) — return confidence below 0.2 so it routes to noise.';

+  "Given the tool events from a single completed Claude Code turn and the current TRACE.md, propose ONE short edit — a single sentence capturing what meaningfully changed or was decided in this turn. Skip trivial turns (return confidence below 0.2). Return ONLY {\"section\": \"<section>\", \"edit\": \"<one sentence>\", \"confidence\": 0.0-1.0}. Pick section from: Decision Log, Assumption Ledger, Open Questions, In Scope, Out of Scope.";
